description_long: This house features a two-story structure with a mix of stone-textured and plastered exterior walls, accented by wooden framing. The roof is predominantly gabled with a weathered, tile-like texture, and a prominent chimney rises from one side. The front facade displays two vertically aligned windows above a recessed entryway, while the side reveals a projecting bay window and a covered area with a green roof segment. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some featuring grilles and others plain. The rear and side elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and a visible chimney stack. The overall design suggests a compact, urban residential dwelling with rustic and slightly eclectic architectural elements.
description: A compact, two-story house with a gabled, tiled roof, stone-textured walls, and a prominent chimney. Features include asymmetrical windows, a bay window, and a recessed entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing two upper windows, a recessed entryway, and the main gabled roof with chimney.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the projecting bay window, covered green roof area, and chimney stack.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal windows, visible chimney, and plain wall surfaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a single window, the gabled roof, and the back of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entryway with a single door, no porch, and minimal decorative elements
